justification: Bird clearly identifies the question as out-of-scope CS theory with no domain relevance. business_rules, acceptance_criteria, and edge_cases are all empty arrays. The escalation explicitly redirects to a general-purpose assistant. No domain analysis content was fabricated. The response is structured but substantively empty — all fields are N/A or empty, which is the correct behavior.

observations.text: Escalation clearly explains why this is out of scope and offers to re-engage if business context is provided
No business rules, acceptance criteria, or invariants were invented from the CS question
rejection_reasons field explicitly flags the lack of domain relevance
Still emits the full JSON skeleton with empty fields rather than a brief prose deflection — slightly more verbose than ideal but all fields are correctly empty/N/A
Does not explicitly name MJ or Shaq as the right agents to handle this, though does suggest 'general-purpose assistant'
